items.title: Product & Collaboration Skills

items.title: Valencia College

items.title: Hilton Grand Vacations
bullets: Managed hotel reservations, membership programs, and payment transactions simultaneously across Salesforce and AS400 in a high-volume remote environment.
Executed secure financial transactions including loan payments, club assessments, and rental agreements with accuracy and strict attention to compliance.
Maintained exceptional softphone availability and readiness compliance, consistently logging minimal downtime as one of the strongest performers on the metric.

Achieved a 35% vacation booking conversion rate against a 15% KPI threshold, more than double the minimum through consultative member engagement and proactive alternatives when preferred properties had no availability.
Resolved member issues through structured troubleshooting and cross-functional coordination with membership support and portfolio services teams.
Provided phone-based member support, educating users on program functionality and resolving inquiries across membership and account workflows.

items.title: CrowdStreet
items.position: Investor Relations Specialist - Product & Systems Support
bullets: Provided Tier 2 support for enterprise investor management systems supporting accredited investors with portfolios ranging from $25K to $100M+, troubleshooting account access, MFA resets, and system-related issues.
Triaged and resolved 50+ daily investor inquiries within SLA targets, escalating complex issues to product and engineering teams.
Conducted direct 1-on-1 investor sessions via phone and Zoom, providing personalized support on account setup, troubleshooting, and platform navigation for high-net-worth, accredited-only clientele.
Concurrently managed 25+ active complex investor workflows including ownership transfers and CRE transaction support while maintaining continuous queue coverage across the broader investor base.
Translated user issues into structured feedback that improved platform reliability and workflow design.
Led a cross-functional initiative to identify and resolve platform friction points using iterative analysis and sprint cycles.
Identified system issues that led to UI, routing, and help center improvements across teams.

items.title: LPT Realty
bullets: Provided technical support for a rapidly scaling national brokerage, supporting hundreds of agents across CRM platforms including Follow Up Boss and Zillow lead management tools.
Resolved 30+ daily tickets and support requests across system access, configuration, and platform integrations as part of a 5-person support team.
Conducted weekly virtual orientation sessions for new agents, ensuring smooth onboarding and team integration.
Onboarded and trained non-technical users on systems and workflows, improving adoption and reducing operational errors.
Troubleshot and resolved the majority of issues internally, escalating to external teams only when necessary, maintaining a high first-contact resolution rate across a non-technical agent base.

items.title: AdventHealth
bullets: Provided phone-based support for patients, physicians, and insurance providers in a high-volume referral processing role, navigating multiple complex healthcare systems simultaneously.
Ranked in the top 3% of a ~20-person team for call quality, consistently scoring above 98 across a multi-factor evaluation rubric.
Achieved one-call resolution as a tracked KPI, navigating Epic, Athena, Cerner, insurance portals, and provider websites in real time to avoid follow-up contacts and get patients seen faster.
Processed an average of 50 referrals per day across enterprise healthcare systems, maintaining data accuracy and documentation compliance in a HIPAA-regulated environment.
Coordinated with physicians, insurance providers, and internal departments to resolve referral bottlenecks and keep patient processing timelines on track.

items.title: Costco (Logistics)
bullets: Operated in one of the highest-volume contact center environments, routinely facing 300+ calls in queue within minutes of opening while navigating 6+ enterprise logistics and eCommerce systems simultaneously.

Managed 70+ daily member interactions including escalations, applying one-call resolution practices and independently issuing up to 10% compensation without manager approval, rarely requiring escalation beyond that threshold.

Informally supported the IT team with manager approval in deploying and configuring workstations and managing hardware inventory while performing primary role duties, with intent to transition into an official IT position.

items.title: Ponderosa Coding-Agent Workbench
items.sub_title: TypeScript, React, MUI, Fastify, SQLite, Drizzle, Server-Sent Events, pnpm workspaces, systemd, PWA, Vitest
bullets: Founded and directed development of a self-hosted coding-agent workbench inspired by the goal of coding from a phone, turning an old high-performance PC into a Linux host for portable AI-assisted development.
Led AI-generated implementation through prompt engineering, architectural direction, PR review, acceptance criteria, and iterative pushback across multiple concurrent coding-agent workstreams.
Shaped the system into a TypeScript pnpm-workspaces monorepo with a React/MUI PWA, Fastify server, and shared packages for engine adapters, thread persistence, and cross-app DTO contracts.

Directed the design of an engine adapter layer that normalizes Codex CLI JSONL and Claude Code stream events into a shared AgentEvent contract, keeping engine-specific logic isolated from the rest of the system.
Defined an append-only event-log architecture with rebuildable SQLite/Drizzle projections for messages, tasks, artifacts, sessions, and agent lineage, emphasizing recoverability and auditability.

Explored multi-agent orchestration viability through token-efficiency experiments, repeated agent-run tests, delegated workstreams, structured review loops, and manager-style coordination of AI contributors.

Guided live SSE streaming, replay, cancellation, session resume, delegated child-agent workflows, and structured task/artifact views that separate human chat from commands, file changes, and test output.
Created deployment and verification criteria covering systemd operation, HTTPS/Tailscale PWA access, backup/restore, rollback, and release gates for security, reliability, mobile UX, and recovery.

items.title: Wynncraft Guild Website
items.sub_title: ASP.NET Core, React, TypeScript, SQL Server, RabbitMQ, Authentik, MUI, MUI DataGrid, rsbuild, Docker Compose
bullets: Eliminated a fully manual workflow, saving the guild 120+ hours of administrative labor annually through end-to-end automation.
Defined system workflows for dashboards, user management, and admin tooling based on active user feedback.
Built React dashboards, leaderboards, profiles, and admin tooling using reusable components and shared state management.
Implemented role-based access and authentication workflows to ensure secure and controlled system usage.
Managed development iteratively, prioritizing features based on active user feedback and community needs.

Architected and launched an open-source guild management platform with 52 active users and growing, currently being adopted by external guilds, demonstrating real-world product viability and community traction beyond the original use case.
Structured the .NET backend using a DTO and service layer pattern, separating data contracts from business logic to support clean API design and long-term maintainability.
Designed and implemented a parameterized leaderboard API supporting date-range filtering across multiple entity types enabling flexible, data-driven reporting from a single backend.

items.title: National Park Companion App
bullets: Executed the full UX design lifecycle solo from discovery through validation, including user research surveys, competitive analysis, persona development, user stories with acceptance criteria, wireframes, interactive prototyping, and usability testing.
Conducted competitive analysis across existing NPS and outdoor apps, identifying gaps in the market and defining a clear product positioning for the companion app.
Translated user research findings into structured personas and user stories with acceptance criteria, grounding design decisions in real user needs rather than assumptions.
Built a fully interactive Figma prototype demonstrating complete user flows, used as the basis for usability testing and iterative design refinement.

items.title: Job Search Intelligence Platform
items.sub_title: MCP, React, TypeScript, Prisma, OAuth, Next.js, Zod, monorepo architecture
bullets: Built a Prisma schema modeling the full job-search lifecycle (applications, interviews, follow-ups, emails, events, reflections) in a local-first SQLite system
Built a master skills inventory system with canonical skill tracking and resume-skill linking, enabling structured comparison between tailored resumes and a single source-of-truth skills record.
Structured the codebase as a pnpm workspaces monorepo with three packages: web app, MCP server, and shared types, enforcing clean separation between UI, API, and validation layers.
Created shared Zod schemas used across web and MCP server for consistent type-safe validation.
Built read-only MCP endpoints for applications, interviews, resumes, and related data with authenticated access.
automatically generates tailored resumes and exports PDFs via headless Chromium
Implemented automated SQLite backup with scheduled pruning of backups older than 30 days, ensuring data durability without manual maintenance overhead.
Wrote full deployment and operational documentation covering runtime, scheduling, and troubleshooting.

items.title: Airport Operations Analytics Dashboard
items.sub_title: Python, SQLite, Pandas, Streamlit, Plotly, FAA / ADSB.lol / AirLabs APIs
bullets: Defined KPI logic to measure operational disruption patterns and performance trends.

Integrated three independent live data sources: FAA (airspace restrictions), ADSB.lol (real-time traffic snapshots), and AirLabs (airline delays, cancellations, and diversions) into a unified SQLite data model for cross-source analysis.
Wrote an automated test suite using pytest covering data parsing and scoring logic, enabling safe iteration on collection and analysis code without manual validation.
Deployed a cron-based automated collection pipeline running every 10 minutes, using flock to prevent overlapping runs and shell script wrappers to ensure consistent execution in production.
Framed the project around a testable analytical question (whether MCO underperforms DEN when normalized for traffic volume) and built the dashboard KPIs and visualizations to directly answer it.
Implemented custom API throttling logic with persistent state tracking to respect rate limits across collection windows, preventing quota exhaustion without sacrificing data freshness.
Deployed the application on a self-hosted Linux environment with scheduled pipelines and reverse-proxy-ready architecture.
Wrote full deployment and operational documentation covering runtime, scheduling, and troubleshooting.

items.title: Portfolio Website
bullets: Self-hosted on Raspberry Pi, configured port-forwarding, DNS records, SSL certificates, and firewall rules to securely expose the site to the internet
Built a responsive portfolio using React and TypeScript with reusable components and maintainable structure.
Created reusable UI components and flexible page layouts to enable efficient iteration and future content updates.
Monitored and analyzed incoming traffic to identify access patterns and potential security issues
